item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":true,"same_means_type":true,"prior_repair_count":3,"is_n_plus_1_request":true,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":true,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":true,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.9,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"looped a colored band around one tray with no origin detail"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"wedged a pencil note under another tray's lid"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"called a greenhouse worker about a third tray's pest status"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"The next tray lacks its water-treatment note; leave a temporary cue with the carrier before it moves"}],"abstain_reason":""}
